intention: 漫长的工作日，形容工作了很久很累
sentencePatterns: I need some ___ after a long day at work.
After a long day at work, I usually ___.
realLifeExamples: I need some stretching after a long day at work.
After a long day at work, I usually take a short walk to clear my head.
productionPrompts: 你怎么形容工作了很长时间很累？用 a long day at work 说出来。
